title: Infection of others prohibited
doc_html:
§1121.2. Infection of others prohibited

            It is unlawful for any person to inoculate or infect another person in any manner with a venereal disease or to do any act which will expose another to inoculation or infection with a venereal disease.

            Redesignated from R.S. 40:1062 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1121.2.  Infection of others prohibited
It is unlawful for any person to inoculate or infect another person in any manner with
a venereal disease or to do any act which will expose another to inoculation or infection with
a venereal disease.
Redesignated from R.S. 40:1062 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
